answer_select_owner_or_admin.name: answer_select_owner_or_admin
answer_select_owner_or_admin.using:
"answer"."user_id" = auth.uid() or 
  exists (
    select 1
    from "account" a
    where a.user_id = auth.uid()
      and a.role = 'admin'
  )

  )

question_insert_owner_or_admin.name: question_insert_owner_or_admin
question_insert_owner_or_admin.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from "account" a
    where a.user_id = auth.uid()
      and a.role = 'admin'
  )

        or (
          "question"."user_id" = auth.uid()
          and 
  exists (
    select 1
    from "form" f
    where f.id = "question"."form_id"
      and f.user_id = auth.uid()
  )

        )

test_profile_select_public_or_admin.name: test_profile_select_public_or_admin
test_profile_select_public_or_admin.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from "account" a
    where a.user_id = auth.uid()
      and a.role = 'admin'
  )
 or 
  exists (
    select 1
    from "test" t
    where t.id = "test_profile"."test_id"
      and t.status = 'published'
  )

test_result_insert_public.name: test_result_insert_public
test_result_insert_public.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from "test" t
    where t.id = "test_result"."test_id"
      and t.status = 'published'
  )

        and exists (
          select 1
          from "test_profile" p
          where p.id = "test_result"."profile_id"
            and p.test_id = "test_result"."test_id"
        )

      and a.role = 'admin'
  )
 or "test"."status" = 'published'
